definition: The establishing of sati in a structured field of practice such as body, feeling, mind, or qualities.
notes: The project prefers establishment of sati because it preserves the house decision to leave sati untranslated while keeping the practical force of the compound clear. Foundation of mindfulness is discouraged because it reimports a rendering the project is already avoiding in the head term.

context_rules.context: In most doctrinal and practice contexts
In prose emphasizing the active practice of bringing sati into place
context_rules.notes: Acceptable alternate when the verbal movement matters more.

example_phrases.notes: Main collective expression for the framework.
Headword form as used in the main discourse title.
